[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Stanford Farm cash sales + GAS fix + docs for future AIs
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):

  Details:
  ## What
  Sold 7 serialized QR-coded cacao bags to Will Chen at Stanford Farm, fixed a GAS log-noise bug, and documented three critical patterns for future AIs.
  
  ## Changes
  - **7 [SALES EVENT] submissions**: Will Chen bought 6 ceremonial cacao + 1 nibs bag for 5 cash each (will.chen85@gmail.com)
  - **GAS fix**: updateStripeCheckoutMetadata now validates cs_(live|test)_ prefix before searching Stripe checkout sheet — cash/manual sales skipped silently instead of logging errors
  - **agentic_ai_context docs**: cash sale pattern (Stripe Session ID = (none)), ledger assignment ≠ physical possession, downstream auto-depletion chain
  - **dao_client template**: bulk_qr_sales_template.py updated with cash sale hints
  
  ## GitHub

  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_client/pull/15
